verbs.summary: The text states that Solomon “ἐγέννησεν” (beget/fathered) Rehoboam. It then continues that Rehoboam “ἐγέννησεν” (beget/fathered) Abijah, and Abijah “ἐγέννησεν” (beget/fathered) Asa. The verb is used to describe successive parent-child relationships formed through begetting/giving birth.
